gate.untrained: You lack the Tailoring training required to use the Tailoring Hub.

hub.title: Tailoring Hub
hub.noMaterials: No tailoring materials found. Drag items from the sidebar into the import zone below to tag them.
hub.importPrompt: Drop items here to import as tailoring materials
hub.materialImported: {name} has been tagged as a tailoring material.
hub.recipeDropPrompt: Drag an item here to register as a craftable recipe
hub.recipeRegistered: {name} has been registered as a tailoring recipe.
hub.noRecipes: No recipes registered. Drag items from the sidebar into the drop zone above to register them as craftable products.

craftTradeGoods.label: Craft Trade Goods
craftTradeGoods.description: Convert materials into sellable trade goods.

craftEquipment.label: Craft Equipment
craftEquipment.description: Craft clothing, armour, or accessories from materials.

mend.label: Mend Party Clothing
mend.description: Mend and present the party's clothing for social boons.

craftDisguise.label: Craft Disguise
craftDisguise.description: Create a social or environmental disguise.

applyModification.label: Apply Modification
applyModification.description: Apply a tailoring modification to cloth or leather equipment.

confirm.gmOnly: Only the GM can confirm tailoring proposals.
confirm.alreadyResolved: This proposal has already been resolved.
confirm.actorNotFound: Could not resolve the crafting actor.
confirm.inputsChanged: The actor no longer holds the claimed inputs. Inventory may have changed.
confirm.notAnAffix: The dragged document is not a valid Crucible affix.

query.noGM: No GM available to process tailoring. Try again when a GM is online.
query.rollTimeout: The roll request timed out. The player may have disconnected.
query.rollFailed: The roll completed but produced no result. Please try again.
query.insufficientRank: Your Tailoring training rank is too low for this activity.
query.proposalPending: You already have a pending tailoring proposal. Wait for the GM to resolve it.
query.missingToolkit: You need a Tailor's Toolkit to perform this activity.
query.missingPortableWorkbench: You need a Tailor's Portable Workbench to perform this activity.
query.missingRepairKit: You need a Repair Kit (tailor) to mend clothing.

convert.title: Review Craft Result
convert.strongFailureWarning: Strong failure: materials will be consumed but nothing will be produced.

modification.title: Apply Modification
modification.dropPrompt: Drag an affix from the compendium here
modification.noAffix: Drag an affix onto the output side first.

flow.noMaterials: You have no tailoring materials. Import materials first using the import zone.
flow.invalidPayload: Could not assemble the craft request. Check your selections.
flow.proposalSent: Proposal sent to GM for confirmation.
flow.noRecipesAvailable: No recipes available. Register items as recipes using the recipe drop zone in the Tailoring Hub.
flow.selectPartyMembers: Select party members to mend for:
flow.noEligibleItems: No eligible cloth or leather items found on this character.

mend.noBoons: This mending has no boons to apply (shoddy quality).
mend.effectDescription: The party's clothing has been expertly mended. +{boonCount} to social skill checks where appearance matters.
mend.applied: Mended Presentation applied: +{boonCount} to social skills until next rest.
